name: @artale/pi-intel
description: Competitor intelligence. Track GitHub repos, npm packages, download trends, weekly digests.
readme:
# @artale/pi-intel

Competitor intelligence. Track GitHub repos, npm packages, download trends.

## Install
```bash
npm install -g @artale/pi-intel
```

## Tools
- **intel_scan** — Scan tracked competitors for latest data
- **intel_compare** — Side-by-side comparison
- **intel_trends** — npm download trends (last 4 weeks)

## Commands
- `/intel` — Intelligence dashboard
